themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 14 verses. Commentary leans on "Then I will establish the throne of thy kingdom upon Israel for ever, as I promised to David...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
